linear.$description: Linear — constant velocity (progress bars 等の cumulative motion)

in.$description: Ease-in — slow start, fast end (退場 animation)

out.$description: Ease-out — fast start, slow end (登場 animation、 Material 3 default)

in-out.$description: Ease-in-out — smooth both ends (state change、 standard default)

spring.$description: Spring — Creo brand bouncy curve (3D Frame morph / lively interactions)
